import React from 'react' import { Card } from "flowbite-react"; /************* ✨ Windsurf Command ⭐ *************/ /** * A card component that displays a noteworthy technology acquisition of 2021 * with a title, image and description. * The image is a paper bag with a smartphone and credit cards. * The title is "Noteworthy technology acquisitions 2021". * The description is "Here are the biggest enterprise technology acquisitions of 2021 so far, in reverse chronological order.". *//******* 1645207c-c573-452e-8b50-262b4dc3d4ec *******/ const Details = () => { return (
Noteworthy technology acquisitions 2021

Here are the biggest enterprise technology acquisitions of 2021 so far, in reverse chronological order.

) } export default Details
